programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Brendon and Priya want to explore Priya's bisexuality - will a steamy hot tub hit the spot? Chelsea and George disagree over how far they should take things.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Married couple Abbie and Charlie are missing one thing from their family: a woman to turn them into a throuple. And glamour puss Chrissie is looking for husband number four.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: In a particularly active episode, Armando Iannucci performs a daring stunt, Kumail Nanjiani moves bowling pins with oven gloves, and Joanna Page unwisely attempts a handstand.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hair stylist meets a nutritionist with a bit of 'swag'. A conspiracy theorist is matched with a science teacher who also wrestles. And an opera singer serenades his date.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: Up a long garden path in Leeds lies a Victorian villa that's been a labour of love for Jawad and Charlie. And in Brixton, George hopes for a clean sweep with a redundant chimney.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire's Herriot Country, Matt takes to the skies, Mike meets the ancestors of the famous 'Mouseman' furniture maker and Janice visits a stunning lavender farm.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Brian and Paula are on the move after closing their eatery in France. And have Louisa's guesthouse fortunes changed in Spain.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: A new series with our favourite family-run estate agents. In Almería, the Garners juggle wow-factor villas and a wildcard. Lisa and John face tough compromises on the Costa Blanca.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Susie and John met on a dancing holiday in Spain, and are now looking for the perfect holiday home near Estepona. Jean Johansson lines up five properties for their £100,000 budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: John and Debbie are dreaming of a two-bedroom home that could one day become their permanent residence on the Costa Cálida in Spain. Lucy Alexander shows them what their money can buy.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha transform their courtyard before back-to-back weddings commence. Anna and Edward spruce up their roof for a wine weekend. Roger and Louisa create a new ensuite.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or
programme.desc: Brilliant Builds: Did Alex and Danny's lofty ambitions for their attic give them the space they needed in their Preston semi.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First aid manager Jacqui plans a hearty menu of pâté, venison, sticky toffee pudding and a bit of banter. But there's sniping and insults between the guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Daniel puts his twist on a traditional Scottish menu, with spaghetti 'hagginaise' and Irn-Bru ice cream. But feisty Jenna can't hide her dislike of the host.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Basque-born Lorea showcases the food of her homeland. But with tensions still simmering, is it a good idea to get her guests to draw portraits of each other.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jenna plans a night of perfection, but her decision to cover her floor in plastic confuses her guests, and there's yet more drama between her and Daniel.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: New Zealand-born Craig hopes that his lobster and wild boar will blow his rivals out of the water. But the brewing tension threatens to boil over.

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Edinburgh locals perform the one song that tells their story - from the tune a 22-year-old played at his mum's funeral to the Zach Bryan track that helped an ex-soldier with his PTSD.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: In Switzerland, Paul travels up front on the stunning Glacier Express and drives a funicular train to the Reichenbach Falls, where Sherlock Holmes met his fictional demise.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Ruby-Rose is ready to level up from dog sitting to a dog of her own. Could a cheeky Yorkie be the one? And will ex-cabbie Danny give Bella the Border collie a lift.

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The drone police join the search for a woman who left a suicide note and vanished. Officers track a dodgy dog-breeding gang to a horrific hovel. And a wrongdoer's hiding up a tree.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Secret Garden, Love on the Spectrum, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Conspiracies and Coverups and the Housemaid.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time the celebs watch Squid Game, Glastonbury, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Trainwreck: Poop Cruise and Millionaire Hoarders.

programme.title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children
programme.desc: Eva Green and Asa Butterfield star in Tim Burton's fantasy adventure. A teenager enters the magical, but scary and violent, world where his grandfather grew up.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In East Anglia, a seriously ill dialysis patient desperately needs fluids. And on Canvey Island, the medics take over the breathing of a motorcyclist who's bleeding from his ear.

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Japanese prisons have become retirement homes for a rising number of elderly convicts. Krishnan Guru-Murthy investigates the country's geriatric crime wave.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home
programme.desc: On Merseyside, George has radical ideas to redesign an Edwardian home. In Surrey, he tackles a Victorian country house that has accrued some bizarre additions over the years.

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum & Dad
programme.desc: In Alnwick, the Bakers immerse themselves in castle life, take on extreme gardening and visit the shop where the 'Keep Calm and Carry On' poster was discovered.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where
programme.desc: In Italy, will Kevin and Laura finish their renovations before guests arrive? And can Vicky and Aurelian rise to the challenge as they open a bakery in France.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguezes help Jill and Dene find the perfect balance of comfort and outdoor living. In Murcia, the Browns hunt for a villa for Paul and Bobbie's blended family.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Marianne and Anthony from West Yorkshire to find their perfect holiday home in the Axarquía region of southern Spain, on a budget of £50,000.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King helps Jenny buy her first-ever property - in San Antonio on Ibiza. Can Leah find the perfect apartment close to the beach for Jenny's £250k.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Lionel and Claire take on a luxury en-suite. Alison and Zion tackle gaping ceilings as they rebuild a top-floor apartment. Tim and Sasha prepare for not one but two huge weddings.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Brilliant Builds: Kirstie and Phil look back on one of their most turbulent builds ever - Amber and Martin's working from home transformation in Waterbeach, Cambridgeshire.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host is 25-year-old journalist Leah, who hopes that her Mediterranean feast will leave her guests feeling stuffed and happy.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal trainer Vincenzo aims to impress his guests with an evening full of Italian passion inspired by family recipes, plus some singing and salsa dancing.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bar manager Josh hopes to wow his guests with a menu inspired by his favourite tipple: beer. Even the entertainment is beer-based.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Texan psychologist David hosts. Will his love of Mexican cooking produce a night to remember? Or will the controversial conversations overshadow the food.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Event organiser Gina hopes to win with an evening of fine dining, inspired by her love of cookery courses. But that's not all the night has in store.

programme.title: Cadbury vs McVitie's: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: In the ultimate sweet-snack slugfest, from dunking to gifting to shrinking chocs, Kate Quilton discovers how these landmark brands are battling to be Britain's top treat.

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: Danny and Danielle take on a mansion with spectacular views, and spectacular problems. Can Aled and Sarah get their auction abode ready in time for their wedding.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time the celebs watch Squid Game, Glastonbury, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, Celebrity Bridge of Lies, Trainwreck: Poop Cruise and Millionaire Hoarders.

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: The dramatic inside story of 6 November 1956, the final day of the 1956 Suez Crisis. A day that changed Britain forever, exactly as it happened.

programme.title: Suez: 24 Hours That Broke the British Empire
programme.desc: The dramatic inside story of how the Suez Crisis triggered a global crisis, felled a Prime Minister and ended Britain's dominance as a super-power.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. In his first mission, Gordon spies on a family-run Greek eatery that's gone downhill.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay infiltrates struggling restaurants with the help of a secret insider. Can Gordon change owner Patrick's toxic ways to save his business - and his marriage.

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: On the French Riviera, Paul takes control of a steam engine on the stunning Pine Cone line and rides in the cab of millionaire businessman Paul Ricard's private line.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A decorator's had a nasty fall and may have a bleed on the brain. A motorcyclist is given ketamine after breaking a leg. And Doreen has been trampled by a foal.
